title: CCDelics Iron Wings
description: Fly your horse! This mod adds wings that allow you to fly on minecraft horses in a balanced and fair way.
body:
#

CCDelics Iron Wings 🐎🪽

![Fabric API required for this mod banner.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d96e9beaeabbdb44f8e9cb17214f96decc4716b7_0.webp) # The **Iron Wings** mod adds wings that can be equipped on a horse to let horses fly!
![Player flying with the Netherite Wings equipped.](https://github.com/ccdelic1/ccdelicironwings/blob/main/previewGi2f.gif?raw=true)
The purpose of this mod is to add a pre-elytra flight mechanic that feels balanced. It also gives new meaning to horse stats, as the horses speed stat, jump stat and health stat impacts the horses flight speed, altitude gain and, in the event your wings break mid flight, the health stat will hopefully help eat some of the fall damage.
![Banner informing viewers that the speed Stat determines the flight speed rate. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/154562c4169b194f1c136356ef1e0617a5d27a3a.png)
![Banner informing viewers that the jump Stat determines the altitude gain rate. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a329c11dbcb0b373fdbe7afdde28619edfb30d3.png)
This approach to flight is great because horses aren't really worth it in the base game currently. Nether highways are the meta, but maybe this will change that!
![Crafting recipes for the Wing Set, Iron Wings and Netherite Wings.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b13722c5e3d101c1678c85d21d69ed9433b8559c.png)
There are three items. The **Wing Set**, The **Iron Wing**s and The **Netherite Wings**.
The wing set is a crafting ingredient only, used to build the iron wings and used to repair the iron wings. The iron wings are the item that allows you to fly, but it has limited durability. If you upgrade it to netherite the same way you upgrade diamond tools, it becomes the netherite wings and has infinite durability! #
### Credits: ⭐ Made by [CCDelic](https://modrinth.com/user/ccdelic) for Fabric 1.21.11. Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

![The minecraft head of the mod author, CCDelic.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a7b9bc354075663e2f489f6f42afdb2787a3afb.png)
